title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 9 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 9 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 9 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 09/04/2026
The overall trend for iron ore futures was weak today, with the main contract I2609 closing at 750 RMB/ton,down 2.53% from the previous session. Spot prices fell 7-12 RMB/ton, with traders showing general willingness to quote but steel mills restocking only as needed and making few inquiries, resulting in limited spot market transactions so far. According to SMM's sample survey of 10 ports, inventory reached 115.94 million tons, down 3.37 million tons month-on-month.
